name: brand-canvas
description: Interactive Brand Strategy Canvas coaching — guides founders through the 9-box brand strategy framework from Patrick Woods' book.

commands.name: canvas
commands.description: Start or continue your Brand Strategy Canvas. Routes to the right section based on current state.

skills.name: canvas-opportunity
skills.description: Guides founders through the Market Opportunity section: Customer Insight (A), Competitive Environment (B), and Features (C)
triggerPhrases: work on the market opportunity section
define my target audience for the canvas
fill out the top section of the brand canvas

skills.name: canvas-benefits
skills.description: Guides founders through Rational and Emotional Benefits using the Ladder of Abstraction
triggerPhrases: work on the benefits section of the canvas
find the emotional benefits of my product

skills.name: canvas-position
skills.description: Guides founders through crafting the Positioning Statement and Brand Essence
triggerPhrases: work on the positioning section of the canvas

skills.name: canvas-voice
skills.description: Guides founders through Values, Personality, and Key Messages
